evals.prompt: Look up the human gene BRCA2 in Ensembl and give me its Ensembl gene ID, chromosomal coordinates, and transcripts.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ensembl to call the Ensembl REST API symbol lookup (e.g. /lookup/symbol/homo_sapiens/BRCA2 or client.symbol_lookup) returning the ENSG ID, location, and transcript information, optionally expanded.

evals.prompt: Predict the functional consequence of the variant ENST00000380152.7:c.803C>T in human using the Variant Effect Predictor.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ensembl to run VEP via the REST API (vep_hgvs / the VEP endpoint) for human, returning the predicted molecular consequence(s) of the HGVS variant.

evals.prompt: Find the mouse ortholog of human BRCA2 (ENSG00000139618) so I can compare the gene across species.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ensembl for comparative genomics using the homology endpoint (homology_ensemblgene with target_species mouse), returning the mouse ortholog of the human gene.

assertions.value: Uses the Ensembl homology/comparative-genomics endpoint to return the mouse ortholog of the human gene.

evals.prompt: I have a position on GRCh37 at chromosome 7:140453136. Map it to GRCh38 coordinates for me.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ensembl to use the assembly-mapping capability (AssemblyMapper / the assembly map endpoint) to convert the coordinate from GRCh37 to GRCh38, noting the grch37.rest.ensembl.org server for legacy queries.

assertions.value: Performs a GRCh37-to-GRCh38 assembly coordinate conversion using Ensembl's assembly mapping.

evals.prompt: Give me the functional annotation, domains, and post-translational modifications for the BRCA2 protein from UniProt.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-uniprot. The user wants curated protein-level annotation (function, domains, PTMs) from UniProt, not genomic gene/sequence/coordinate data from Ensembl.

evals.prompt: Is the BRCA2 variant rs80359550 classified as pathogenic or benign for hereditary breast cancer? I need its ClinVar clinical significance and review status.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-clinvar. Ensembl/VEP predicts molecular consequences but does not assign ACMG/AMP clinical pathogenicity classifications; the clinical-significance call belongs to ClinVar.
